What we offer

Two sports.
One facility.

⛳ Golf
Golf Simulators
Play world-class courses from anywhere in the world. Foresight Sports simulators deliver tour-level accuracy for swing data, ball flight, and course play.
Foresight Sports 100+ courses Group events $35 / hour
⚾ Baseball
Baseball Cages
Full-size indoor batting cages with pitching machines built for baseball. Individual practice, team training, and private lessons available year-round.
Pitching machines Private lessons Team clinics $25 / 30 min
🥎 Softball
Softball Cages
Dedicated indoor softball cages with pitching machines. Train your swing, work on pitching mechanics, or bring the whole team in for a clinic — any time of year.
Pitching machines Private lessons Youth clinics $25 / 30 min

What's happening

Events &
clinics.

We run golf scrambles, golf leagues, baseball/softball lessons, and clinics throughout the year. Check back often or call us to get on the list.
